results.src:
//@version=6
indicator("x")
type T
    int f
var a = array.new<T>()
array.sort(a, sort_field=syminfo.tickerid)
plot(close)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
type T
    int f
var a = array.new<T>()
x = array.sort_indices(a, sort_field=syminfo.tickerid)
plot(close)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
p1 = plot(close)
p2 = plot(open)
fill(p1, p2, title=syminfo.tickerid, color=color.red)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
p1 = plot(close)
p2 = plot(open)
fill(p1, p2, title="t", color=color.red, fillgaps=timeframe.isdaily)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
enum E
    a
    b
var E e = E.a
e := bar_index % 2 == 0 ? E.a : E.b
x = input.enum(e)
plot(close)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
enum E
    a
    b
x = input.enum(defval=E.a, title=syminfo.tickerid)
plot(close)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
enum E
    a
    b
x = input.enum(defval=E.a, tooltip=syminfo.tickerid)
plot(close)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
enum E
    a
    b
x = input.enum(defval=E.a, inline=syminfo.tickerid)
plot(close)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
enum E
    a
    b
x = input.enum(defval=E.a, group=syminfo.tickerid)
plot(close)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
enum E
    a
    b
x = input.enum(defval=E.a, confirm=timeframe.isdaily)
plot(close)

//@version=6
indicator("x")
enum E
    a
    b
x = input.enum(defval=E.a, display=int(syminfo.mintick))
plot(close)
